title: Chen Long's Matchup Network
subtitle: Click an opponent to reveal how the pattern changes across seven games.
datasetNote: Seven games from three Chen Long matches: Denmark Open 2019 QF, World Tour Finals 2019 Group Stage, and Malaysia Masters 2020 QF.

opponents.name: Chou Tien Chen
opponents.narrative: Chen Long controlled the Chou matchup: 4–0 in games, with his most common scoring pattern being Winner (36.2%).

opponents.name: Viktor Axelsen
opponents.narrative: Against Axelsen, the story flips: Chen Long won only 1 of 3 games, and the opponent's top point pattern was Opponent Winner (39.6%).

encoding.nodeSize: Opponent node size represents observed rallies.
encoding.selectedEdgeLabel: Selected edge shows Chen Long's top scoring pattern against that opponent.
encoding.dim: Non-selected opponents fade so the chosen matchup becomes the narrative focus.
